title: jarilla
intro: Jarilla is a small shrub or herb native to the Americas, scientifically known as Cordia boissieri, which belongs to the bignonia family. The medicinal properties of Jarilla lie in its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jarilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Jarilla can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
